properties.label: Chest Plate of the North
properties.description: Layered steel from northern wardens, scarred by every frostbitten rake of a Pritscher claw.

properties.label: Leather Armor
properties.description: Supple hide stitched by Nouraajd's tannery guild for scouts slipping between alleys.

properties.label: Plate Armor
properties.description: Standard issue harness from Mayor Irvin's barracks, dented by years of holding the town gates.

properties.label: Robe
properties.description: Threadbare robe worn by Father Beren's acolytes, its hem darkened by incense soot and grave-dust.

properties.label: Armor of Missile Attraction
properties.description: Siege plate salvaged from Victor's walls, its steel humming with a hunger for flung iron. Every Pritscher bolt on the field bends toward the wearer, and the straps refuse every hand until the curse is broken.

properties.label: Breastplate of Petrified Wood
properties.description: Boards of stone-hard fossil oak strapped over quilted cloth; a humble ward that turns aside the odd claw.

properties.label: Rib Cage
properties.description: Harness of lacquered beast ribs favored by grave-witches; the dead find its shape familiar and pass by. Part of the Armor of the Damned set (4 pieces).

properties.label: Armor of Wonder
properties.description: Shimmering mail of no known forge that fits every wearer as if measured; every virtue rises a little beneath it.

properties.label: Dragon Scale Armor
properties.description: Overlapping scales stripped from a red wyrm's flank; furnace heat and Pritscher claws alike slide off. Part of the Wrath of the Dragon Father set (4 pieces).

properties.label: Titan's Cuirass
properties.description: Storm-blued plate hammered for a giant's chest and cut down by Victor's smiths; thunder rolls off it like rain.
